title: Dineout Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Dineout Capital India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Dineout Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dineout Capital India:
Dineout Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout Capital India!
